summary: Tested Cross-Mentor Deposits tracking system and Mentor Dashboard commission breakdown. All 21 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified: Cross-Mentor Deposits page loads with effort summary cards, bonus progress bar, record deposit dialog. Mentor Dashboard shows commission breakdown (Flat 1% + Net 1% + Team Override 0.5% + Total).
passed_tests: GET /api/mentor/cross-deposits/search-student?q=ahmed returns 200
Student search returns list with required fields (id, full_name)
GET /api/mentor/cross-deposits returns deposits and effort_summary
Cross-deposits with period filter works (period=this_month)
Effort summary structure has mentor_id, mentor_name, total_effort_usd, total_effort_aed, deposit_count
GET /api/mentor/effort-summary returns 200
Effort summary has own_deposits_usd, cross_deposits_usd, total_effort_usd, bonus_tier
Total effort calculation: own_deposits + cross_deposits = total_effort
GET /api/mentor/dashboard?period=overall returns 200
Mentor dashboard has flat_commission_aed, net_commission_aed, team_override_aed, total_commission_aed
Mentor dashboard has bonus structure with month_net_usd, slabs, current_slab, next_slab
Total commission = flat + net + team_override
POST /api/mentor/cross-deposits requires student_id (400 without)
POST /api/mentor/cross-deposits requires positive amount (400 for zero)
POST /api/mentor/cross-deposits validates student exists (404 for nonexistent)
Admin can access cross-deposits endpoint
Admin can access effort-summary endpoint
Dashboard individual view mode works
Dashboard team view mode works for Master of Academics
Dashboard has all revenue fields (deposits, withdrawals, net in USD and AED)
Cross-Mentor Deposits page loads at /mentor/cross-deposits
Sidebar link visible under Academics section
Own Deposits card shows $14,580 (10 deposits)
Cross-Mentor Deposits card shows $0 (0 deposits)
Total Effort card shows $14,580 (10 total deposits)
Bonus Status card shows 10% of salary
Bonus progress bar with tier markers ($10K-$50K)
Record Deposit dialog has student search, amount, date, notes fields
Mentor Dashboard shows Commission card with Flat/Net/Team Override/Total
Mentor Dashboard shows Bonus Progress with slab tiers
Mentor Dashboard shows Revenue Overview (Deposits/Withdrawals/Net)
critical_code_review_comments: server.py lines 8649-8695: GET /api/mentor/cross-deposits correctly filters by effort_by_id and returns effort_summary aggregation
server.py lines 8698-8710: Student search endpoint correctly searches by name/email/phone with regex
server.py lines 8713-8788: POST /api/mentor/cross-deposits correctly sets effort_by_id to current user and mentor_id to student's assigned mentor
server.py lines 8791-8850: GET /api/mentor/effort-summary correctly calculates own_deposits + cross_deposits = total_effort
server.py lines 8424-8431: Bonus calculation uses effort-based query: effort_by_id OR (mentor_id AND no effort_by)
server.py lines 8388-8415: Commission breakdown: flat_commission_aed (1% deposits), net_commission_aed (1% net), team_override_aed (0.5% team net)
CrossMentorDepositsPage.jsx: Correctly displays effort summary cards, bonus progress bar, and record deposit dialog
MentorDashboardPage.jsx lines 188-220: Commission card correctly shows Flat/Net/Team Override/Total with toggle for sensitive data
Layout.jsx line 142: Cross-Mentor Deposits sidebar link correctly placed under Academics section
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing data. Edwin has $14,580 in own deposits (10 deposits), $0 in cross-mentor deposits.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Cross-Mentor Deposits feature fully tested and working. Key points: (1) effort_by_id field tracks who brought the deposit, (2) mentor_id tracks whose student it is, (3) Bonus calculation uses total effort (own + cross deposits), (4) Commission breakdown: 1% flat + 1% net + 0.5% team override. Edwin (Master of Academics) has 196 students, $77,291.64 USD in deposits, 10% bonus tier achieved.

api_endpoints.GET /api/mentor/effort-summary: Returns own/cross/total effort with bonus tier
api_endpoints.GET /api/mentor/dashboard: Returns commission breakdown and bonus structure
